poses.name: neutral_stand
poses.notes: Balanced neutral stance with a mild chest lift.

poses.name: relaxed_idle
poses.notes: Weight settled over the left hip with an easy shoulder drop.

poses.name: ready_stance
poses.notes: Athletic guard pose ready to step or react.

poses.name: hero_pose
poses.notes: Open chest silhouette with both elbows bent outward.

poses.name: contrapposto
poses.notes: Classic S-curve weight shift with the right side compressed.

poses.name: lean_forward
poses.notes: Body pitched forward from the ankles as if listening in.

poses.name: lean_back
poses.notes: Chest and head drawn back while the feet stay planted.

poses.name: walk_start
poses.notes: First beat of a step with the right arm forward and left leg advancing.

poses.name: sit_casual
poses.notes: One hip dropped to the side with the right knee opened outward.

poses.name: kneel_one_leg
poses.notes: Left knee down, right foot planted, torso upright and alert.

poses.name: wall_back_rest
poses.notes: Back against the wall with the right foot braced higher for support.

poses.name: wall_chill_pose
poses.notes: Loose hallway lean with one shoulder and hip carrying the pose.

poses.name: wall_launch
poses.notes: Driving off the wall with the left arm extended for balance.

poses.name: wall_look_around_corner
poses.notes: Torso twisted around a corner with the left arm leading the peek.

poses.name: wall_push_stretch
poses.notes: Both palms posted to the wall in a broad shoulder stretch.

poses.name: wall_relaxed_lean
poses.notes: Casual side lean with the left shoulder sunk into the wall.

poses.name: wall_shoulder_lean
poses.notes: Right shoulder pressed into the wall while the head stays engaged.

poses.name: wall_sit_rest
poses.notes: Floor sit at the wall with both knees folded in opposite directions.

poses.name: wall_thinking_lean
poses.notes: Head lowered and left side posted as if thinking through the next move.

poses.name: wall_tired_lean
poses.notes: Forward droop into the wall with both knees soft and heavy.
